name: What is answer engine optimization and do lawyers really need it?
description: AEO/GEO gets your firm cited in AI answers; vital as traditional SEO fades.[3][4]

mainEntity.name: What is answer engine optimization and do lawyers really need it?

acceptedAnswer.text: AEO/GEO gets your firm cited in AI answers; vital as traditional SEO fades.[3][4]
acceptedAnswer.description: **Answer Engine Optimization (AEO) or GEO optimizes law firm content to be cited by AI tools like Google AI Overviews, not just search rankings.**[3][4] Traditional SEO ranks pages; AEO/GEO makes your firm the recommended source in AI responses to legal queries.[2][6] **Key factors:** 1. AI answers 70%+ of searches directly.[4] 2. Lawyers win by addressing client FAQs precisely.[6] 3. EEAT signals boost AI trust.[3] 4. Proven ROI for Am Law firms.[2] **Audit your site for question-based content, add New York court specifics if local, and track AI mentions; ignore it and lose to optimized competitors.**[3] GEO is essential as SEO evolves.[3]
